prompt: Create a photorealistic luxury lifestyle advertisement featuring a black Apple Watch Ultra-style smartwatch worn on the left wrist of a well-groomed adult man. The watch must be the hero object: a rounded-square black case with a dark inactive glass screen, thick rugged bezel, side crown and buttons, and a black leather or textured band with subtle warm brown edge accents; preserve the case shape, band shape, materials, and tactile textures exactly. Show the man's hand resting elegantly on a polished wooden table, fingers extended naturally, with realistic skin pores, veins, knuckles, nails, and soft highlights. He wears a deep navy suit with a crisp white shirt cuff visible behind the watch. Set the scene in an upscale private lounge or hotel club with warm wood paneling, brown leather armchairs, a side table, soft curtains, a green plant, and glowing table lamps in the blurred background. Use shallow depth of field, warm amber indoor lighting, cinematic bokeh, premium editorial composition, and a close-up three-quarter angle from slightly above the table. Keep the watch sharply focused while the background is softly defocused. No text, no logo emphasis, no extra accessories, no distorted anatomy, no changed watch proportions, no added screen UI.
